twitter_thread: 70% of passive income strategies fail due to poor taxation planning, costing $10k/yr.
Offset gains from dividend-paying stocks like Apple ($0.82/dividend) with tax-loss harvesting.
Vanguard's Total Stock Market Index Fund has a 5% turnover rate, minimizing capital gains tax.
High-fee investments like American Funds' Growth Fund of America (1.24% expense ratio) can eat 25% of returns.
Using a solo 401(k) for real estate investing can save $5k/yr in taxes on a $100k property.
Reinvesting dividends from Coca-Cola (3.1% yield) and Johnson & Johnson (2.7% yield) can add 10% to annual returns.
What's your strategy for minimizing taxes on passive income? #passiveincome #taxplanning
